ADI.rationale: Profile fields are entirely empty; cannot validate or propose a theme without sector/industry/summary.

ANNA.rationale: Profile fields empty (AleAnna Class A); no business context available to judge.

ASAN.rationale: Profile fields empty for Asana; cannot reason from name alone per the routine rules.

BAX.rationale: Diversified healthcare conglomerate (IV systems, dialysis machines, pharmaceuticals); no single existing theme captures the breadth, so singleton is plausibly correct.

BBWI.rationale: Specialty retailer of personal care and home fragrance; closest existing theme is Consumer/Cosmetics but BBWI is more body care/fragrance than makeup — no clean fit, singleton acceptable.

BHC.rationale: Diversified specialty pharma (Salix, Bausch + Lomb, Solta) spanning multiple therapeutic areas; no single biotech sub-theme captures it cleanly.

DVA.rationale: DaVita is the only major outpatient dialysis operator in the taxonomy; genuinely idiosyncratic with no peer theme available.

FRPT.rationale: Freshpet is a standalone fresh pet food brand; no pet-food or animal-nutrition theme exists in the taxonomy, so singleton is correct.

GPRO.rationale: Action camera maker; no consumer electronics / camera theme exists in the current taxonomy, so singleton remains the best available label.

IP.rationale: Renewable fiber-based packaging (containerboard); no paper/packaging theme exists in the current taxonomy.

LRCX.rationale: Lam Research designs and services semiconductor processing equipment used in IC fabrication; current tag 'AI - Semiconductor Processing' is a precise match.

MRVL.rationale: Marvell delivers data-infrastructure silicon spanning data center core to network edge; both current themes (AI - Infra / Core Chips, AI - Data Center & Cloud) reflect the business accurately.

SNAP.rationale: Snap operates Snapchat, a visual messaging platform whose revenue is overwhelmingly driven by advertising; current singleton tag is a stale fallback from initial classification.

TWLO.rationale: Twilio is a cloud communications/customer-engagement API platform; current 'Software / Data & Analytics' tag is mediocre but no clearly better existing theme captures communications-platform-as-a-service — flag for human review of taxonomy gap.
